ddls:
CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which data is collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* The name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the data is collected */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the data is collected */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* The number of injuries reported in that year and region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registered_motorcycles" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the data is collected */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the data is collected */,
  "registered_motorcycles" INTEGER /* The number of registered motorcycles in that year and region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registered_motorcycles_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registered_motorcycles_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_rates_per_100k" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury rate record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the data is collected */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the data is collected */,
  "injury_rate_per_100k" REAL /* The injury rate per 100,000 registered motorcycles in that year and region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_rates_per_100k_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_rates_per_100k_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_miles_traveled" (
  "vmt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle miles traveled record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the data is collected */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the data is collected */,
  "vehicle_miles_traveled" REAL /* The vehicle miles traveled (in millions) in that year and region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vmt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_miles_traveled_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_miles_traveled_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_rates_per_100m_vmt" (
  "vmt_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury rate per 100 million VMT record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the data is collected */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the data is collected */,
  "injury_rate_per_100m_vmt" REAL /* The injury rate per 100 million vehicle miles traveled in that year and region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vmt_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_rates_per_100m_vmt_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_rates_per_100m_vmt_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data is accessed */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Description of the data viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., injuries, registered motorcycles) */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data is for */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data is for */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the collaboration is for */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the collaboration is for */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration occurred */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., research, analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)
